metadata.title: LoreForge
metadata.description: LoreForge frontend for campaigns, character sheets, and real-time maps.

login.title: LoreForge
login.tagline: The truth lies beyond the Membrane. Forge your investigation, track clues, and command the paranormal.
login.disclaimer: LoreForge is an unofficial VTT platform.

authError.failed: Could not complete sign-in. Please try again.

authError.session: Your session expired or could not be validated. Please sign in again.
authError.config: The frontend is not pointing at the production API. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL in Vercel and redeploy.
